title: Inkling origin
description: An addon that adds the "inkling" origin based on the defile mod.
body:
# Inkling Origin
**A solid body? I prefer ink.**

![Ingling during an eclipse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65aa4289aa5ce63ca97c1468b63182ac528be3fc_0.webp)

## Disclaimer
At the time of releasing this mod, the Defile and origins mods are not  compatible due to a library clash. You can easily fix this if you follow this: [Here](https://github.com/doctor4t/Issues/issues/63)

Since you need to use an edited version of defile, you should not use this in any modpacks or share the edited version of defile anywhere without the permision of [**Doctor4t**](https://modrinth.com/user/RAT) and keep this for personal use only.

(if doctor4t does not wish for this information to be shared, i will delete this addon immediately)

## Features
This addon introduces the "Inkling" origin to the origins mod. The main feature is that you can toggle between normal and Inkmorphosis state at any time.

**No need for Totems of Uncleansing!**

### Abilities

**Ink Facade** - you can swith between a normal and Inkmorphosis state at any time using the [Primary] ability.

**Unstable body** - since Ink is not as stable as solid materials, Inkling bodies can only support the weight of up to iron armor.

**Easy to splash** - Ink does not support the same amount of vitality as organic compounds, therefore Inklings only have 7 hearts worth of HP.

**Weak arms** - since liquid ink is not as powerful as solid materials, inklings deal 20% less melee damage.

**Slow on ground** - ink is not supposed to move, therefore inklings move slower on ground (they are still faster then usual while walking on ink or when submerged in it).

**Smaller than usual** - since liquds pack more densely than solids, you are 25% smaller than usual.

## Releases
I have released this both as a **Mod** and a **Datapack**

I have no plans to update or release this addon for other versions of minecraft unless requested.

If you  have any recommendations for updates or balance changes, feel free to message me through GitHub
